title: Inputs_for basic nested form (single level)
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/author_form_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.AuthorFormLive) that renders a form for Author with a single-level nested :books association via <.inputs_for>. Use <.form for={@form} phx-change="validate" phx-submit="save">. The inputs_for block renders <.input field={book[:title]} label="Title" /> for each book. mount/3 builds the form via to_form(MyApp.Library.change_author(%MyApp.Library.Author{})). handle_event validate re-runs with action :validate and re-forms.
tier_rationale: inputs_for function-component form introduction. Non-adversarial nested form.
